fixes.origin:
stmt = text(
    "SELECT id, actor, action, created_at "
    "FROM audit_log "
    "WHERE actor = '" + actor + "' "
    "ORDER BY created_at DESC "
    "LIMIT :lim"
)
rows = session.execute(stmt, {"lim": limit}).mappings().all()
fixes.replacement:
stmt = text(
    "SELECT id, actor, action, created_at "
    "FROM audit_log "
    "WHERE actor = :actor "
    "ORDER BY created_at DESC "
    "LIMIT :lim"
)
rows = session.execute(stmt, {"actor": actor, "lim": limit}).mappings().all()
